| Area of expertise | Volunteer(s) |
|------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| Git | Lara Eddington, Lauren Snaarthorst and Menna Zayed |
| RShiny | Rich Bielby, Cam Race and Menna Zayed |
| R data manipulation | Lara Eddington, Lauren Snaarthorst and Menna Zayed |
| Automated QA | Rich Bielby, Lara Eddington, Cam Race, Lauren Snaarthorst and Menna Zayed |
| LLMs | Philip Ovington |
| EES API | Rich Bielby and Cam Race |
| Python | Mohamed Zayed |
